name: Logic - Electrons Connect
short_description: Logical game for meditation in which you need to connect all of the electrons among themselves.
detailed_description:
This is interesting logical game for meditation in which you need to connect all of the electrons among themselves. But remember the rules:
- You can connect only opposite charges
- Lines must not overlap
- Now the game has 50 levels
about_the_game:
